name: TC-TXN-009 — Security: Returns 401 when Authorization header is missing
description:
Confirms the API enforces authentication and rejects unauthenticated requests.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/summary?period=today
**Headers:** No Authorization header
**Expected:** HTTP 401 Unauthorized with an error message.

This validates that the API is properly secured and not publicly accessible.
descriptionHtml:
Confirms the API enforces authentication and rejects unauthenticated requests.

Endpoint: GET /api/v1/transaction/summary?period=today
Headers: No Authorization header
Expected: HTTP 401 Unauthorized with an error message.

This validates that the API is properly secured and not publicly accessible.
statusMessage:
Error: Unauthenticated request must return 401 or 403, got 502

expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf

Expected value: 502
Received array: [401, 403]
